writing.currentProjectSynopsis: A cartographer discovers that the maps she's been drawing for a coastal survey company have been physically altering the landscape. As she investigates the source of this power, she must decide whether to keep reshaping the world to her vision or accept the terrain as it is.
writing.influences: Ursula K. Le Guin, China Mieville, Carmen Maria Machado, Jeff VanderMeer, Kelly Link
writing.proseDensityPreference: mid-density, leans lyrical in descriptive passages and spare in dialogue
writing.recurringStrengths: strong sensory imagery, distinctive character voices, inventive worldbuilding details
writing.recurringWeaknesses: tendency toward passive protagonists in early drafts, info-dumping in first-chapter exposition, sagging middles around the 40% mark
writing.revisionApproach: writes full first draft before any revision, then does three structural passes before line editing
writing.completionHistory: 2 novels trunked, 4 short stories published in literary magazines
